refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS prioritization.
DP3: Integrate real-time packet loss monitoring and feedback control.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically encapsulates communication quality control, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating latency monitoring as part of the adaptive protocol to balance packet loss and responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and communication stack responsible for teleoperation control and communication quality management.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection used for teleoperation data exchange.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to send communication quality metrics and status to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands from NGHE Solution or operator.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains overall system but teleoperation communication logic is diffused if placed here.
Vehicle module focuses on physical control, less suitable for communication protocol logic.
Best containment for communication protocol and packet loss management.
Safety Services focus on alerts and safety policies, not communication quality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for telemetry and tasking.
Dependency on network link quality outside Teleoperation control.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and monitoring boundaries between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution to mitigate interface complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear performance focus on packet loss control.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as DP is contained within Teleoperation module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module is the best architectural fit for the DP, ensuring clear ownership and interface boundaries.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Teleoperation interfaces and network link testing.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of communication quality responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Add latency monitoring to DP to balance packet loss and responsiveness.
Clarify interface definitions between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the requirements with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Verification and ownership are well defined with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: Incorporate latency monitoring and control to optimize teleoperation responsiveness alongside packet loss.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Teleoperation module has sufficient control over communication protocols.
open_risks: Latency impact due to retransmission strategies.
Interface complexity between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Packet loss and latency measurements under representative network conditions.
